name: Certificate Tracker - Free Certs Automation

parameters.content:
## 🎓 Certificate Tracker Setup

### Free Certificates to Track:

**Tier 1 - High Value (Proctored)**
- Oracle OCI Foundations (FREE exam)
- Google Professional ML Engineer ($200)
- Microsoft AZ-900 (free vouchers available)
- Anthropic CCA-F ($99)
- NVIDIA GenAI Associate ($125-400)

**Tier 2 - Free Completion Badges**
- LinkedIn Learning (470+ free courses)
- Google Skills Boost
- Cisco Networking Academy
- IBM SkillsBuild
- Anthropic Academy (13 free courses)
- OpenAI Academy

### Setup:
1. Create a Notion database with columns:
   - Certificate Name
   - Provider
   - Status (Not Started/In Progress/Completed)
   - Deadline
   - URL
   - Notes
2. Add Notion API credentials
3. Add Telegram credentials for notifications
4. Activate workflow!

description: Track free certifications from Google, Microsoft, Cisco, Oracle, LinkedIn, NVIDIA, Anthropic. Sends daily Telegram alerts for deadlines and progress.
